subject: feat(ui): z-index scale, burger menu disclosure pattern, timer audit
body:
Three glow-props alignment items:

1. Z-index scale standardization: Aligned all 21 z-index values
   across 11 files to canonical scale — canvas 0-10, headers 20,
   sheets 30, nav 40, menu 40/50, modals 60, toasts 70, debug 80.

2. Burger menu disclosure pattern: Extracted BurgerMenu.jsx from
   inline MobileLayout code. Adds cursor-pointer on backdrop (iOS
   Safari fix), hasBeenOpenRef focus guard, overscroll-contain,
   useId() for aria-controls, Escape key handler, nav+ul/li
   disclosure semantics (replaces incorrect role=menu/menuitem).

3. Timer leak audit: All 9 useEffect hooks with setTimeout/setInterval
   have proper cleanup. No nested timeouts found. No changes needed.

Tags: ui, a11y, z-index, burger-menu, accessibility, glow-props-alignment
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: glow-props-alignment
